info.description: Site-wide theme: colors for every part of the site (dark homepage sections and light inner pages alike), fonts, shape/shadow style, logo & favicon. Editing and publishing here updates the live site within ~60 seconds — no code change needed.

brandColor.description: Background for the highlighted call-to-action banner, your logo badge, and decorative homepage accents

accentColor.description: Accent color — used for secondary CTAs and highlights

headerColor.description: Background color of the header bar at the top of the site (where your logo and menu are)

footerColor.description: Background color of the footer at the bottom of the site

pageBackgroundColor.description: Background color behind the sections down the middle of your pages (hero, stats, highlights, etc.)

cardColor.description: Tint color for cards and boxes shown on dark sections (testimonials, offices, etc.)

buttonColor.description: Color of the main action buttons across the site (e.g. "Browse Products", "Get a Quote")

navHighlightColor.description: Color used to highlight whichever page you're currently on in the menu

headerTextColor.description: Text color in the header bar (menu links, logo text)

footerTextColor.description: Text color in the footer (links, contact info)

pageTextColor.description: Text color on the dark sections down the middle of your pages (headings, paragraphs)

cardTextColor.description: Text color inside cards and boxes on dark sections

sectionColor.description: Background color of the light banner and divider sections on inner pages (About, Contact, Products, Services, Blog, Portfolio, Testimonials, Privacy Policy, Terms)

sectionTextColor.description: Text color on those light banner and divider sections

contentCardColor.description: Background color of cards, boxes, forms, and menus on inner pages (product cards, service cards, testimonial cards, the navigation dropdown)

contentCardTextColor.description: Text color inside those cards, boxes, forms, and menus

fontPairing.description: Heading + body font pairing used across the whole site

radiusStyle.description: Corner roundness for cards, buttons, and chips site-wide

shadowStyle.description: Shadow depth for cards and buttons site-wide

logo.description: Header logo. Falls back to the text badge when unset.

favicon.description: Browser tab icon. Falls back to favicon.ico when unset.

showTrustedByLogos.description: Show the "Trusted by Industry Leaders" client logo strip on the home page. Turn this off until you have real client logos to show.
